---
name: seo-audit
description: 'Audit and fix SEO issues on the Astro site. Use for: improving search rankings, verifying meta tags, validating structured data, checking sitemaps/robots.txt, optimizing Open Graph and Twitter Cards.'
argument-hint: 'Describe what SEO aspect to audit (e.g., "blog posts", "homepage", "structured data")'
---

# SEO Audit & Fix

## When to Use
- Audit or improve search engine optimization
- Verify meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Cards
- Validate structured data (JSON-LD)
- Check technical SEO (sitemap, robots.txt, canonicals)
- Optimize content SEO (headings, internal links, keywords)

## Audit Checklist

### 1. Per-page Meta Tags
For each page type, verify:
- [ ] `<title>` — unique, under 60 chars, includes primary keyword + brand
- [ ] `<meta name="description">` — unique, 120-160 chars, includes call to action
- [ ] `<link rel="canonical">` — absolute URL, matches page URL
- [ ] `<meta name="keywords">` — relevant Italian + English keywords
- [ ] `<meta name="author">` — "Michele Ferracin"

### 2. Open Graph
- [ ] `og:title`, `og:description`, `og:url`, `og:type`, `og:site_name`
- [ ] `og:image` — if available (1200x630px recommended)
- [ ] `og:locale` — "it_IT"
- [ ] `article:published_time` — on blog posts
- [ ] `article:author` — on blog posts

### 3. Twitter Cards
- [ ] `twitter:card` — "summary_large_image"
- [ ] `twitter:title`, `twitter:description`
- [ ] `twitter:image` — if available

### 4. Structured Data (JSON-LD)
- [ ] **WebSite** schema on all pages (in BaseLayout)
- [ ] **BlogPosting** schema on each blog post (headline, datePublished, author, publisher)
- [ ] **BreadcrumbList** on blog posts
- [ ] Validate at https://search.google.com/test/rich-results

### 5. Technical SEO
- [ ] Sitemap at `/sitemap-index.xml` (auto-generated by @astrojs/sitemap)
- [ ] RSS feed at `/rss.xml`
- [ ] `robots.txt` at `/robots.txt` — verify Allow: / for all agents
- [ ] All pages return 200 status
- [ ] Canonical URLs use production domain (https://micheleferracin.it)
- [ ] `hreflang` tags present (it + x-default)
- [ ] No orphan pages (all posts linked from blog index)

### 6. Content SEO
- [ ] Blog post titles are descriptive and keyword-rich
- [ ] First paragraph summarizes the post (used as excerpt in listings)
- [ ] Internal links between related posts
- [ ] H1 → H2 → H3 hierarchy correct
- [ ] Images have alt text

## Implementation Locations

| What | Where |
|------|-------|
| Global meta/OG/Twitter | [src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro](../../../src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro) |
| Blog post meta/JSON-LD | [src/layouts/BlogPost.astro](../../../src/layouts/BlogPost.astro) |
| Sitemap config | [astro.config.mjs](../../../astro.config.mjs) |
| robots.txt | [public/robots.txt](../../../public/robots.txt) |
| RSS feed | [src/pages/rss.xml.js](../../../src/pages/rss.xml.js) |
| AI discovery | [public/ai.txt](../../../public/ai.txt) |

## Verification Commands

```bash
# Build and check for errors
npm run build

# Validate HTML output
curl -s http://localhost:4321/ | grep -c "og:title"
curl -s http://localhost:4321/rss.xml | head -5
curl -s http://localhost:4321/robots.txt
curl -s http://localhost:4321/sitemap-index.xml
```

## Procedure
1. Run through the checklist above for the requested scope
2. For issues found, edit the relevant layout/page files
3. Run `npm run build` to validate changes
4. Test with dev server: `npm run dev`
5. Validate structured data at Google Rich Results Test
